svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: var(--ge-adaptive-bg, #ffffff); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Architecture" id="arch"> <mxGraphModel dx="1030" dy="626" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="600" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="proposalBox" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;dashed=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="PROPOSAL PLANE (untrusted)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="360" width="260" x="40" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="llm" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" value="LLM
(proposer)

emits proposed
tool invocation
I = (T, x)

no execution authority" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160" width="180" x="80" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="interceptorBox" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="INTERCEPTOR (verified disposer)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="440" width="300" x="380" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="schema" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="1. schema check
(typed args well-formed?)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="240" x="410" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pre" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="2. precondition
(permitted in current state?)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="240" x="410" y="185" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="apply" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="3. apply to candidate state" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="240" x="410" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="post" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="4. postcondition
(result as promised?)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="240" x="410" y="305" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="decision" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="commit | rollback" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="160" x="450" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="execBox" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="EXECUTION PLANE" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="440" width="280" x="760" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="state" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;" value="authoritative state S
(typed; only mutated here)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="220" x="790" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="trace" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;" value="hash-chained trace
(tamper-evident;
every decision logged)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="220" x="790" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="llm" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="schema"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=10;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;" value="propose I=(T,x)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="100" x="300" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="schema" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;" target="pre"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="pre" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;" target="apply"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="apply" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;" target="post"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="post" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;" target="decision"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ecommit" edge="1" parent="1" source="decision" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;" target="state"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ecommitlabel" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=10;fontColor=#82b366;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;" value="commit" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="60" x="685" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="etrace" edge="1" parent="1" source="decision" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#82b366;" target="trace"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ereject" edge="1" parent="1" source="decision" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#b85450;dashed=1;fontSize=10;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;" target="llm"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="530" y="560" /> <mxPoint x="170" y="560" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="erejectlabel" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=10;fontColor=#b85450;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;" value="rollback + structured error signal (retry)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="240" x="300" y="540" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="caption" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=11;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="Two-plane architecture. The LLM proposes; the interceptor (schema, precondition, postcondition) is the sole path to state mutation. Rejected proposals roll back and return a structured error for retry." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="1000" x="40" y="575" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 258px; height: 1px; padding-top: 7px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
LLM
(proposer)
emits proposed
tool invocation
I = (T, x)
no execution authority

div.div: Two-plane architecture. The LLM proposes; the interceptor (schema, precondition, postcondition) is the sole path to state mutation. Rejected proposals roll back and return a structured error for retry.
